instruction: 请从给定的论文片段中提取标题及其所有作者，并建立 AUTHORED_BY 关系。
input: GraphPrompt : Unifying Pre-Training and Downstream Tasks for Graph Neural Networks Zemin Liu 1 National University of Singapore, Xingtong Yu 2 University of Science and Technology of China, Yuan Fang 3 Singapore Management University, Xinming Zhang 2 University of Science and Technology of China

output.subject: GraphPrompt: Unifying Pre-Training and Downstream Tasks for Graph Neural Networks
GraphPrompt: Unifying Pre-Training and Downstream Tasks for Graph Neural Networks
GraphPrompt: Unifying Pre-Training and Downstream Tasks for Graph Neural Networks
GraphPrompt: Unifying Pre-Training and Downstream Tasks for Graph Neural Networks

instruction: 识别文本中提到的核心模型及其发表的论文，建立 PROPOSED_BY 关系。
input: In this paper, we propose GraphPrompt, a novel pre-training and prompting framework on graphs. GraphPrompt not only unifies pre-training and downstream tasks into a common task template...

output.subject: GraphPrompt
output.object: GraphPrompt: Unifying Pre-Training and Downstream Tasks for Graph Neural Networks

instruction: 根据描述，提取 GraphPrompt 模型在实验中所使用的所有公开数据集，建立 USES_DATASET 关系。
input: Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on five public datasets to evaluate and analyze GraphPrompt. (1) Flickr is an image sharing network. (2) PROTEINS is a collection of protein graphs. (3) COX2 is a dataset of molecular structures. (4) ENZYMES is a dataset of 600 enzymes. (5) BZR is a collection of 405 ligands.

instruction: 从文中提取与 GraphPrompt 模型相关的核心技术概念，并建立 ALIGNED_WITH 关系。
input: GraphPrompt unifies both the node- and graph-level tasks... into the same template: the similarity calculation of (sub)graph representations. Toward the second challenge, we distinguish different downstream tasks by way of the ReadOut operation on subgraphs.

instruction: 提取文中提及的与 GraphPrompt 进行对比的基准模型（Baselines），建立 CITED_BY 关系表示引用对比。
input: We evaluate GraphPrompt against the state-of-the-art approaches... End-to-end graph neural networks: GCN, GraphSAGE, GAT and GIN. Graph pre-training models: DGI, InfoGraph, and GraphCL. Graph prompt models: GPPT.

instruction: 识别文本中提到的模型评估指标，并建立 ACHIEVED_ON 关系。
input: Table 2 illustrates the results of few-shot node classification. Our proposed GraphPrompt outperforms all the baselines across the three datasets (Flickr, PROTEINS, ENZYMES) in terms of accuracy.

instruction: 根据对预训练阶段的描述，识别 GraphPrompt 模型采用的具体自监督任务概念。
input: In this work, we adopt link prediction as the self-supervised pre-training task, given that links are readily available in any graph without additional annotation cost.

instruction: 提取关于“提示设计”的技术细节概念，建立其与模型的 ALIGNED_WITH 关系。
input: Formally, let p_t denote a learnable prompt vector for a downstream task t. The prompt-assisted ReadOut operation on a subgraph S_x for task t performs a feature weighted summation of node representations.

instruction: 识别文中关于下游任务适配的概念，并将其与模型关联。
input: We focus on the popular node classification and graph classification as downstream tasks. GraphPrompt employs a learnable prompt to assist a downstream task in locating the most relevant knowledge.

instruction: 从关于“参数效率”的分析中提取涉及的概念，并建立 ALIGNED_WITH 关系。
input: The prompt tuning loss is only parameterized by the learnable prompt vector p_t, without the GNN weights. Instead, the pre-trained GNN weights are frozen for downstream tasks. This significantly improves computational efficiency.
